creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
I would suggest waiting and skip this one. During my tests, perhaps related to the large size of the shaders' cache, this version of the driver triggered several times overheating hardware prevention on the graphic card (read: brutal power off). The same issue I had with 520.56.06 driver. I'm testing 515.86.01, and it seems to be safe for now.

Also, the proper link to the driver's page: https://www.nvidia.com/Download/driverResults.aspx/196725/en-us/
